seoTitle: Lucas Heights vs Lucknow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lucas Heights and Lucknow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lucas Heights vs Lucknow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lucas Heights and Lucknow.
heading: Lucas Heights vs Lucknow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lucas Heights, New South Wales and Lucknow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lucas Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Lucknow (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lucas Heights or Lucknow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lucas Heights has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Lucknow scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lucas Heights scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Lucknow scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lucas Heights or Lucknow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lucas Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
